markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority. No markdown projection is generated for WP-KERNEL-009 (prevents projection drift).

scope.scope: Build feature-complete controls for formatting, links, embeds, code, media, graph/backlinks, and UserManual insertion. This MT belongs to TiptapMonacoIntegration. Integrate Tiptap and Monaco as the full-featured Handshake editor surface.
constraints: Use the existing microtask_plan_draft execution surface only; do not introduce a separate MT execution surface or suite field.

Core Handshake behavior must be Handshake-native: no outside app, outside server, external daemon, Docker-only path, SQLite fallback, Redis/Valkey cache authority, or sidecar paper as proof or authority.

Allowed external runtime inputs are limited to operator-provided models, GGUF/model files, tensors/safetensors, and CUI portable artifacts where the owning WP explicitly gates them; Tiptap and Monaco are allowed only as bundled/lockfile-governed product libraries integrated into Handshake.

PostgreSQL plus EventLedger is canonical for durable state, receipts, indexing evidence, runtime proof, and validation; generated markdown, wiki pages, HTML, context bundles, debug reports, and UI projections are projections only.
Every implementation handoff must be restartable by a no-context local model using only the WP/MT contract, current Master Spec bundle, product code, tests, and receipts.
Tiptap/ProseMirror is the canonical rich document engine for this WP; Monaco is the canonical code-block/code editing surface embedded inside Handshake.
Tiptap and Monaco must be fully integrated into Handshake packaging, UI state, backend save/load, visual debugging, and tests; no separate external editor app may be required.
scope.expected_behavior: EditorToolbarAndMenus leaves a concrete, restartable implementation or activation artifact with PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority, Master Spec anchors, UserManual impact, and validator-readable evidence.
acceptance_criteria: EditorToolbarAndMenus is implemented or specified with enough detail for a no-context local model to continue from the MT alone.
The MT names exact product/governance files, state tables or APIs, constraints, failure modes, and verification evidence.
The MT rejects sidecar research-paper authority and outside-runtime proof; accepted research ideas are restated as Handshake-native requirements.
The MT handoff names HBR rows proven, blocked, or not applicable with concrete reasons.
verification: Parse the WP/MT contract and confirm this MT keeps all required fields populated.
Run the smallest relevant product, governance, or fixture test available for the touched surface; if not implemented yet, define the exact future test and negative case.
For UI/editor/UserManual surfaces, use visual debugging or declare why no GUI surface exists for this MT.
Confirm no SQLite, Docker-default, external-app, external-daemon, sidecar-paper, or mock-only proof satisfies the MT.
handoff_requirements: List files changed or intentionally left untouched.
List commands/tests run and exact pass/fail/blocker status.
List EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence, receipt IDs, fixtures, visual-debug artifacts, and repair queues produced or expected.
List remaining risks, compatibility shims, deprecated wording, and next MTs unblocked.

evidence: Built+verified 966bec7d: editor_commands.test.ts 7/7 (real editor) - toolbar + menus. TiptapMonacoIntegration group complete: full app vitest 60 files/442 tests green; tsc --noEmit + eslint clean; offline Playwright roundtrip PASS (bundled Monaco mounts + round-trips, ZERO external network requests, worker chunks loopback-only). RichTextEditor wired into RichDocumentView over the real rich-doc backend; no src/backend or .GOV product code touched.

evidence.finding: M11 canRun never populated + insertContent-over-NodeSelection replacement; L12 insert-only tables; L13 overflow stub; L14 no undo/redo
evidence.fix: canRun across the catalog; NodeSelection-safe insertSafely (inserts AFTER selected nodes); table structure family (add/delete row/column, toggle header, delete table); REAL overflow menu (role=menu, Insert... toolbar toggle, truthful disabled state); undo/redo commands + toolbar buttons with stack-edge canRun; roving tab stop always on an enabled control
tests: editor_commands.test.ts: M11 insert commands on a NodeSelection insert AFTER the node, never replace it
editor_commands.test.ts: L14 undo/redo truthful canRun + revert/reapply
editor_commands.test.ts: L12 table structure commands enable inside a table and edit it
RichTextEditor.test.tsx: opens a REAL overflow menu listing insert + table commands and runs one
RichTextEditor.test.tsx: disables undo until an edit exists, then undo/redo round-trips from the toolbar

adversarial_review_v2.suites_observed: editor_commands.test.ts 7/7 PASS; RichTextEditor.test.tsx toolbar tests PASS (with 2 uncaught jsdom getClientRects errors escaping command dispatch - the scrollIntoView path throws AFTER assertions, so the toolbar tests prove less than they appear to)

findings.title: canRun exists on the descriptor interface but is never populated; toolbar/palette never disable invalid commands
findings.evidence: editor_commands.ts:59 declares canRun; no command in EDITOR_COMMANDS defines it; RichTextEditor.tsx:289-305 disables buttons only via readOnly. Concrete hazard: with a monacoCodeBlock node-selected, "Insert table"/"Insert code block"/"Insert link" run insertContent which REPLACES the selected code block - one toolbar click destroys the block (undoable, but silent).
findings.fix: Populate canRun with editor.can() chains per command; bind disabled={readOnly || !cmd.canRun?.(editor)} in toolbar + palette; add a NodeSelection-replacement regression test.

findings.title: Tables are insert-only: no row/column/delete/toggle-header operations
findings.evidence: editor_commands.ts:168-174 has only table.insert; TableKit provides addRowAfter/addColumnAfter/deleteRow/deleteColumn/deleteTable/toggleHeaderRow but none are cataloged - an inserted table cannot be structurally edited from any UI.
findings.fix: Add the standard table edit command family to EDITOR_COMMANDS (palette category table), shown contextually via canRun.

findings.title: Overflow commands are not operator-reachable from the toolbar; hidden div is a stub
findings.evidence: RichTextEditor.tsx:408-413 renders overflow commands as hidden empty spans; embed/graph/mention/manual commands are reachable only by knowing to open the palette.
findings.fix: Render a real overflow menu (button + popover listing overflowCommands) or fold them into the toolbar with grouping.

findings.title: No undo/redo commands in catalog or toolbar
findings.evidence: EDITOR_COMMANDS has no history commands; keyboard Mod-Z works via StarterKit but there is no discoverable button/palette entry (VS Code-class editors expose both).
findings.fix: Add history.undo/history.redo commands with canRun editor.can().undo()/redo().

parity_gaps: ED-NAV-003 toolbar: PRESENT but PARTIAL (no canRun gating, overflow stub, no undo/redo, tables insert-only)
Plain URL link mark commands absent (set/unset/open link)
missing_tests: toolbar insert command on a NodeSelection does not silently replace the selected block
disabled state reflects canRun for context-invalid commands
jsdom suite: polyfill getClientRects or assert command dispatch does not throw (2 uncaught errors currently escape)

wp_validator_review_v2.review_method: Integration Validator multi-agent workflow (wf_0ac25815-485 + wf_98386044-70a): independent per-MT reviewer + adversarial confirm on FAIL. No ACP. Governance/repo paperwork non-blocking per operator directive (2026-06-18). Bar = good code vs MT contract + WP packet + current Master Spec v02.194, plus the WP_VALIDATOR Spec-Realism Gate.
wp_validator_review_v2.summary: MT-169 (EditorToolbarAndMenus) requires a feature-complete editor toolbar + menus over the Tiptap/Monaco surface (formatting, blocks, lists, tables, code, links, embeds, backlinks/graph, mentions/tags, UserManual insertion). The code delivers a real machine-readable command catalog driving a real toolbar, overflow menu, and command palette over a live Tiptap editor, with truthful enable/disable, NodeSelection-safe inserts, full table-structure editing, and undo/redo — all proven against a real editor in tests. It aligns with current Master Spec §7.1.1.8 and contains no placeholders.
findings: editor_commands.ts:103-546 is a real 565-line command catalog covering every required category (history, format, block, list, table, tableEdit, link, code, embed, graph, mention, manual) — substantial real code, not scaffolding.

Prior adversarial MEDIUM finding (canRun never populated, toolbar could silently REPLACE a node-selected code block) is FIXED: insertSafely (editor_commands.ts:55-61) inserts AFTER a NodeSelection via insertContentAt(selection.to,...); canRun is populated on every command; commandDisabled binds it to the toolbar/palette/overflow (RichTextEditor.tsx:806-807).

Prior LOW findings FIXED: full table-structure family present (editor_commands.ts:242-337: add/delete row/column, toggle header row/column/cell, merge/split, delete table); real overflow menu role=menu with per-command buttons + truthful disabled state (RichTextEditor.tsx:1411-1443); undo/redo commands with stack-edge canRun (editor_commands.ts:107-124) wired into the toolbar.

mention.at/mention.tag now create REAL mention/tagMention nodes via arg-prompted value (editor_commands.ts:496-525), fixing the prior bug where a bare @/# character was inserted and no node could ever be created.

Real runtime proof: editor_commands.test.ts builds new Editor(...) with buildHandshakeEditorExtensions() and asserts NodeSelection survival (lines 186-206), real mention/tag node creation (397-414), table mutation + exact undo (271-312), and wikilink classification — live-editor mutation, not mock-only; satisfies §7.1.1.8 'tests that only parse JSON do not satisfy'.

Spec §7.1.1.8 (current v02.194, 07-user-experience-and-development.md:249-263) requires headings/lists/tables/task lists/quotes/callouts/media embeds/file/folder/project links/backlinks/tags/mentions + Monaco code nodes + stable element identifiers — all delivered with data-testid/data-command-id selectors on every toolbar/palette/overflow button.

sub_rule_1: placeholder grep over the three impl files found only two 'stub' strings, both comments stating the prior hidden stub was REPLACED with a real menu — no reachable todo!/unimplemented!/deferred escapes.

sub_rule_2: this MT is the UI command-catalog/toolbar surface and makes no durable PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority claim of its own; the required real-resource touch is the live Tiptap editor schema, which the tests exercise directly. PG authority is owned by the RichDocument storage MTs, not MT-169.
Boundary/scope clean: commits 966bec7d + 2949bc87 (both ancestors of feat/WP-KERNEL-009 HEAD) touch only app/src/ (allowed_paths); no /.GOV/, no SQLite, no external search engine, no CDN worker.
Aside (non-blocking): MT contract lifecycle.completed_by is null and validator_verdict fields are unset — expected paperwork state during a winding-down governance phase; not a code defect.
evidence_checked: placeholder grep over the three MT-169 impl files

minimum_controls: No placeholders, mocks, scaffolding, or deferred-live escapes; runtime proof against Handshake-managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger where the contract names durable state.
